entryPoints.purpose: Root package manifest and tooling command surface
responsibilities: Declare the Expo Router entry point as expo-router/entry
Define development scripts for Expo start, iOS, Android, and web
Define EAS delegation scripts for sideload IPA and simulator builds
Define format, lint, docs:check, typecheck, test, and aggregate check scripts
Declare runtime and development dependency versions
Set nodeLinker to hoisted for Expo and React Native compatibility

appConfiguration.purpose: Expo app configuration with tooling-relevant runtime flags
responsibilities: Enable expo-router plugin
Enable typed routes
Enable React Compiler
Configure static web output
Declare app identity, icons, splash configuration, and EAS project id
Extend expo/tsconfig.base
Enable strict TypeScript
Map @/* to ./src/*
Map @/assets/* to ./assets/*
Include TS, TSX, Expo generated types, and expo-env.d.ts
Normalize text files to CRLF in the working tree
Preserve binary assets from line-ending conversion
Set end_of_line to CRLF
Set UTF-8 charset, final newline insertion, and two-space indentation
Disable trailing whitespace trimming for Markdown files
Set formatting conventions for supported source files
Configure CRLF endings, final newline insertion, semicolons, single quotes, trailing commas, and 2-space indentation
Ignore generated, external, asset, docs, specs, lockfile, and heavy output paths
Enable TypeScript, Unicorn, OXC, React, Jest, and import plugins
Treat correctness and suspicious categories as errors
Configure browser, Node, Jest, builtin, and ES2024 environments
Define project rules for unused variables, React hooks, and Jest expectations
Ignore generated and build output paths

linting.purpose: Focused ESLint flat config for official React Hooks checks
responsibilities: Load eslint-plugin-react-hooks flat recommended configuration
Use typescript-eslint parser for source and test files
Scope checks to src/**/* and test/**/* JS/TS files
Promote react-hooks/exhaustive-deps to error
Ignore generated dependency and test result folders
Use the jest-expo preset
Load test/setup.ts after the test environment is installed
Match test/unit/**/*.test.ts and test/unit/**/*.test.tsx
Mirror TypeScript aliases for Jest
Map CSS-like imports to test/style-mock.js
Transform React Native, Expo, React Navigation, Reanimated, and Worklets dependencies

testing.purpose: Shared Jest setup and native/Expo mock layer
responsibilities: Install react-native-gesture-handler Jest setup
Mock @/global.css as a virtual module
Mock expo-font loaded and async font APIs
Mock expo-image through React Native Image
Mock react-native-reanimated with its package mock
Document the executable examples under test/unit/examples
Describe how to add new unit tests
Explain alias, RNTL, and shared mock expectations

testing.purpose: Executable example for pure TypeScript logic tests
responsibilities: Import project constants through @/* alias
Assert deterministic spacing and max-width token behavior

testing.purpose: Executable example for React Native component rendering
responsibilities: Render a project component with React Native Testing Library
Assert visible text output through screen queries

testing.purpose: Executable example for alias resolution and shared mocks
responsibilities: Mock the project color-scheme hook for deterministic dark theme behavior
Use the expo-font shared setup mock
Render ThemedText and assert dark theme color application
Verify tracked and newly added text files use CRLF line endings
Verify generated profile files listed in docs/README.md exist and include generated footers
Verify registry-derived references match local source data
Verify docs root markdown is limited to the curated index plus explicit generated profiles and registry-derived references
Parse docs/_index/*.json
Check local Markdown links
Scan for known stale documentation references
Run pnpm format:check
Run pnpm lint, which includes OXC lint and official Hooks lint
Run pnpm docs:check
Run pnpm typecheck
Run pnpm test

decisions.purpose: Accepted ADR for current toolchain choices
responsibilities: Record pnpm hoisted package management decision
Record OXC format and lint decisions
Record official React Hooks ESLint layer decision
Record strict TypeScript and Jest Expo plus RNTL decisions
Document alternatives and revisit conditions

decisions.purpose: Accepted ADR for CRLF policy and documentation automation
responsibilities: Record CRLF as the Windows-first line-ending policy
Record docs:check as the automated documentation gate
Document alternatives and revisit conditions
Document business context, components, workflows, command API, data model, dependencies, file organization, observations, testing, and performance considerations

generatedDocs.purpose: Generated machine-readable tooling module file index
responsibilities: Classify tooling files by component role
Record file purposes, responsibilities, and dependencies
